scanner.classifier: AST-light balanced-call scanner with Supabase chain/context heuristics; no production calls and no DB writes

metrics.scannerScope: src/** and app/** TypeScript/TSX runtime files; excludes tests/specs/contracts, comments, string literals, and non-Supabase Platform.select calls
